prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic 4:5 full-body romantic proposal portrait in a dreamy nighttime park. A handsome young man with a softly anonymized face matching the provided male identity kneels on one knee on a warm stone-paved pathway, facing a graceful young woman with a softly anonymized face matching the provided female identity. He wears a relaxed cobalt-blue button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms, black cargo-style pants, a black smartwatch, and black low-top sneakers with white soles and laces. He holds a large bouquet of red and white flowers with small baby's-breath filler, wrapped in brown kraft paper, offering it upward with both hands. The woman stands in front of him, slightly surprised and touched, one hand near her collarbone, wearing an elegant deep midnight purple embroidered South Asian-style long dress with a matching flowing dupatta, slim pants, and beige block-heel sandals. The setting includes exactly one massive tree trunk sweeping diagonally across the upper left, wrapped with warm white fairy lights, plus two small hanging glass ornament lights under the branch. In the left background, include exactly two upholstered lounge chairs and a small round side table with candles and wine glasses; add one floor lantern with glowing candles beside them. In the far background, show a softly blurred garden, warm bokeh pathway lights, and a cozy house or gazebo with illuminated windows. Use golden-hour-like warm artificial lighting at night, shallow depth of field, romantic bokeh, realistic skin and fabric texture, cinematic contrast, full-body framing from ground to above the tree lights, vertical composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people. The mood should be intimate, elegant, and heartfelt, like a surprise proposal photograph captured with a professional full-frame camera and fast portrait lens.
